name: Fruited Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Cooked Diced Chicken OR Turkey
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss the chicken with soy sauce. Allow to stand for 15 minutes.
2. Mix fruit with celery.
3. Add the chicken to the fruit mixture.
4. Chill thoroughly.
5. Blend dressing: 6 tablespoons Low Fat Yogurt, 5 tablespoons Low Cal Mayonnaise, 4 tablespoons Skim Milk, 2 packets Equal, and 1/4 teaspoon Pumpkin Pie Spice.
6. Arrange portions of the fruited chicken salad on lettuce leaves (about 1 cup each).
7. Spoon the dressing over the salads.
